div.h3: SIMD strlen: Why These Specific Lengths Matter

div.p: Edge case: immediate return handles NULL terminator at start
Prologue handles tiny strings no SIMD loop entered
Max length before SIMD needed tests prologue-only path
Exact vector width match tests single SIMD iteration
First multi-chunk case tests loop continuation
Ends at page boundary tests aligned-from-below
Exactly one 4KB page tests page-crossing safety
Definitely crosses page tests post-boundary handling
Key Insight: Lengths 0-17 test algorithm correctness; lengths 4095-4097 test memory safety.

ul.li: SIMD chunk: 16 bytes (128 bits) for SSE2
Critical invariant: Aligned reads cannot cross page boundaries
